MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT In Favor Of Defendants 1863 Lombard Street Llc And Victor G. Makras Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-10-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS 1863 LOMBARD STREET, LLC, VICTOR G. MAKRAS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT In Favor Of Defendants 1863 Lombard Street Llc And Victor G. Makras Inc. is Off calendar. Notice of settlement filed February 10, 2023.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/CK)

Motion To File First Amended Answer To Plaintiff'S Complaint (Motions)
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS 1863 LOMBARD STREET, LLC and VICTOR G. MAKRAS, INC.'S Motion To File First Amended Answer To Plaintiff'S Complaint.

The "motion to file first amended answer to plaintiff's complaint" is granted. "That trial courts are to liberally permit such amendments, at any stage of the proceeding, has been established policy in this state since 1901." (Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (1981) 118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-89; see also CCP Sec. 428.50(c).) A proposed amended pleading's validity is not considered when deciding leave to amend. (See Kittredge Sports Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1989) 213 Cal.App.3d 1045, 1048.) The scheduled trial date in this case is almost four months off.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in complaince with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion To Amend Defendants' Answer
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS 1863 LOMBARD STREET, LLC and VICTOR G. MAKRAS, INC.'S Motion To Amend Defendants' Answer.

The "motion to amend defendants' answer" is denied without prejudice for noncompliance with CRC 3.1324.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
